name: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC)
summary: Day 69 Thursday. **IRGC FACTIONAL HARDLINE-LEVERAGE TRACK CONTINUES IN PARALLEL TO MOU DIPLOMACY: TASNIM (IRGC-aligned) CALLED THE 14-POINT MOU 'MORE OF A WISHLIST THAN A REALITY' MAY 6 — preserving hardline-leverage rhetoric but NOT calling for retaliation/escalation.** Press TV (IRGC-adjacent state propaganda, English audience) ran 'Project Freedom perishes in 48 hours as Trump retreats under wall of Iran's asymmetric deterrence' — triumphalist victory framing, the kind of language that historically PRECEDES acceptance of a deal because it provides rhetorical cover for the regime to claim leverage success regardless of substantive terms. Internal Iranian posture divergence is now structural: Pezeshkian/Araghchi civilian government on negotiating track (Baqaei: 'assessing,' 'lasting peace top priority') vs IRGC/Tasnim leverage track. **CMA CGM San Antonio struck May 5 by cruise missile (CBS attribution to Iranian cruise missile, IRGC has NOT claimed — itself unusual) demonstrates IRGC tactical leverage continues at operational layer despite civilian-government diplomatic-track signals.** The bifurcation between kinetic risk and political track is now structural — France's Charles de Gaulle CSG redeployment Suez→Red Sea/Gulf of Aden is the European naval response. Mojtaba Day 60-61 absent (AI-generated videos confirmed by TIME) — supreme-leader vacuum is the structural reason both tracks are operating in parallel without unified executive resolution.

active_triggers.condition: IRGC toll booth becomes permanent post-ceasefire

IRGC command structure collapses (multiple leaders killed) — UPDATE 2026-04-08: Stand-down orders obeyed within 2 hours indicate command-and-control INTACT despite Khademi/Bakeri losses. Trigger pre-c

recent_signals.headline: IRGC FACTIONAL HARDLINE-LEVERAGE TRACK CONTINUES IN PARALLEL TO MOU DIPLOMACY: TASNIM (IRGC-aligned) CALLED 14-POINT MOU 'MORE WISHLIST THAN REALITY' MAY 6 (preserving hardline rhetoric, NOT calling for escalation). Press TV: 'Project Freedom perishes... Iran's asymmetric deterrence' — triumphalist victory framing historically precedes deal acceptance. CMA CGM San Antonio struck May 5 by cruise missile in Hormuz off Dubai (CBS attribution to Iranian cruise missile via US officials; IRGC has NOT claimed — itself unusual) — IRGC tactical leverage continues at operational layer despite civilian diplomatic-track signals. France Charles de Gaulle CSG redeployed Suez→Red Sea/Gulf of Aden. Mojtaba Day 60-61 absent (AI-generated videos CONFIRMED by TIME) — supreme-leader vacuum is structural reason for parallel tracks.
recent_signals.verification: Tasnim/Press TV framing = CONFIRMED Iran-side primary; MOU framework = REPORTED multi-corroborated; CMA CGM strike = CONFIRMED action, CLAIMED Iran attribution (single-source US officials via CBS, no IRGC claim); Mojtaba absence = REPORTED extended absence, AI-video usage CONFIRMED by TIME single-source
